title: Update Status Labels - Multiple columns, same status column labels, one update all update
excerpt:
I am using the same status column labels in multiple columns. How can I change the status label of one column and have them update in all columns? 
For example, columns 1, 2, and 3 are identical with labels called “New”,…

posts.author: ramdasananda (Robert Brugioni)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am using the same status column labels in multiple columns. How can I change the status label of one column and have them update in all columns?

For example, columns 1, 2, and 3 are identical with labels called “New”, “Worn”, and “Old”. Now, I want to add another label called “Okay” to all three columns. How can this be accomplished by only changing the label in only one location (either a column OR in a template, for example).

In the example is 3 columns, but in reality I need 40 columns.
Any support is greatly appreciated.

posts.author: kevingyy (Kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julia-monday.com,

I also think this feature might be really useful
Do you know if it’s planned in your roadmap?

Thank you,
Kevin
